selection_policy.official_anchor: Use the run that best balances undefeated or strongest match record with high score and low captures for the stored seed set. Do not blindly trust the harness auto-best file when it prefers score diff over capture quality.
selection_policy.latest_broader_sample: Keep the newest wider-seed benchmark summary for each tracked opponent so regression and volatility can be seen beyond the official anchor seed set.

notes: Promoted from the rollout-scoring refinement that values safe local pellet potential and realized score slightly more strongly inside MonteCarlo playouts.
Replaces the old NeuralNet anchor because it kept the 5-0 record, raised average score substantially, and still held captures to 0.4.
Ledger correction on 2026-04-07: the official run summary records commit 5f3ab80 even though the stored best tag currently resolves to b1ee552.
Promoted from the validated worktree change that stops hard-short-circuiting directly into post-capture escape.
Higher score and fewer captures than the prior 5-0 StaticHeuro anchor, so this is now the official score/capture reference.

Latest headless official rerun in this automation lane, collected from the corridor-pressure safety candidate that also swept the sampled 101/102/110 NeuralNet canary and 101/104/110 StaticHeuro canary.

Not promotable: the full 101-105 NeuralNet lane still fell to 2-3 with renewed score/capture losses on seeds 102, 103, and 105, so the candidate stays below both the official anchor and the prior sampled signal.
Latest headless official rerun in this automation lane, collected from the same corridor-pressure safety candidate that solved the sampled seed-104 StaticHeuro lane.
Not promotable: the full 101-105 StaticHeuro lane still dropped to 2-3 with losses on seeds 101, 103, and 105, so the sampled seed-104 recovery does not generalize across the official validation set.
Latest broader sample in this automation lane, combined from the exact b1ee552 101-105 official validation and the 106-110 extension rerun.

The wider record improves to 7-3 on the current lane with only seeds 101, 102, and 110 still losing, but the average score is still far below the historical NeuralNet anchor family, so this remains a recovery baseline rather than a new official best.
Latest broader sample in this automation lane, combined from the exact b1ee552 101-105 official validation and the 106-110 extension rerun.

The wider StaticHeuro picture improves to a full 10-0 sweep on the current lane with 0.6 self-captures on average. That is broader and cleaner on match record than the prior latest sample, even though it still does not replace the stored 5-seed official anchor on score/capture balance.
